hero.title: Prove every donation.
hero.subtitle: Blockchain-powered crowdfunding transparency platform built on Solana. Every donation is recorded on-chain, publicly verifiable, and tamper-proof.
hero.featuredSubtitle: Transparently track funds for these active projects.
hero.howStep1Desc: Creators deploy an on-chain escrow program with milestone stages.
hero.howStep2Desc: SOL goes straight to the program escrow. No middleman.
hero.howStep3Desc: Creators upload proof of work to IPFS before releasing funds.
hero.howStep4Desc: Escrow releases funds dynamically as each milestone is met.

campaigns.title: All Campaigns
campaigns.emptyDesc: We couldn't find any campaigns matching your search or filters.

detail.creator: Campaign Creator
detail.noDonations: No donations yet. Be the first to donate!

donate.notActive: This campaign is no longer accepting donations.

history.title: My Donations
history.emptyDesc: You haven't made any donations with this wallet yet.

create.title: Create Campaign
create.subtitle: Launch a transparent crowdfunding campaign with milestone-based disbursement on Solana.
create.campaignTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Clean Water for Remote Village
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain your campaign goal, how funds will be spent, and why it matters...
create.minAmountError: Target amount must be at least 0.1 SOL
create.futureDateError: Deadline must be in the future
create.milestonesDesc: Split your campaign target into specific milestones. Funds are released one milestone at a time, requiring proof submission for each step.
create.sumMismatchError: The sum of milestone targets ({sum} SOL) must equal the campaign target ({target} SOL).
create.imageDesc: Upload a cover image for your campaign. The image will be stored on IPFS.
create.uploadError: Failed to upload image to IPFS. Try again.
create.previewDesc: Review your campaign details and milestones before deploying to the Solana network.

dashboard.title: Creator Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your campaigns, manage milestones, submit proof of work, and request escrow disbursements.
dashboard.emptyDesc: You haven't launched any transparent campaigns yet. Create one to get started!
dashboard.disbursementDesc: Escrow releases funds stage-by-stage. Upload spending proofs to transition milestones from Pending to Proof Submitted, then request release.
dashboard.proofDialogDesc: Upload invoices, receipts, or photos proving project implementation. This will be pinned to IPFS and linked on-chain.
dashboard.disburseDialogDesc: You are requesting the release of {amount} SOL from escrow for this milestone. Ensure you have submitted correct proof.
dashboard.disburseSuccess: Funds successfully disbursed to your wallet!
dashboard.noDonations: No donations yet on this campaign.
dashboard.closeCampaignDesc: Close this campaign to claim back remaining rent-exemption SOL. This is only possible if current active donations are 0.
dashboard.closeDialogDesc: This will permanently close the campaign on-chain. Please type the campaign title to confirm:

verify.title: Transaction Verifier
verify.subtitle: Audit and verify any Provify transaction directly on the Solana ledger.
verify.invalidSig: Invalid transaction signature. Solana signatures must be 88 base58 characters.
verify.loading: Fetching transaction details from Solana ledger...
verify.notFound: Transaction not found on Solana network.
verify.notProvify: This transaction is not associated with the Provify program.
verify.rawDesc: Monospace representation of the raw parsed transaction data from the blockchain.
verify.creator: Creator
verify.closedDesc: The campaign escrow account has been closed and remaining rent SOL was returned to the creator.
